'''Mian Hoob''' was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Technicians/Legends|technician]] within the [[Katarn Commandos]], which was lead by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Judder Page/Legends|Judder Page]]. [[Korren]] was the team's other [[Technician/Legends|technician]].
